site.name: Mero Restaurant
site.tagline: The Restaurant Management Platform for Nepal
site.description: Digitize your restaurant in minutes. QR menus, real-time orders, kitchen display, payments, and analytics — all in one platform built for Nepali restaurants.
hero.title: Digitize Your Restaurant
hero.subtitle: Stop juggling paper orders, manual bills, and lost customers. Mero Restaurant gives you a complete digital toolkit — from QR menus to real-time kitchen displays — built specifically for restaurants in Nepal.
features.title: Everything Your Restaurant Needs
features.subtitle: One platform to run your entire restaurant — from the front door to the kitchen.
features.qr.title: QR WiFi & Digital Menu
features.qr.desc: Customers scan a QR code at their table to connect to WiFi and instantly browse your digital menu. No app download required.
features.orders.title: Real-Time Order Management
features.orders.desc: Orders flow instantly from customer phones to your kitchen display. Track every order from placed to served with live status updates.
features.kitchen.title: Kitchen Display System
features.kitchen.desc: Replace paper tickets with a real-time kitchen screen. Chefs see orders as they come in, mark items as ready, and keep the flow moving.
features.payments.title: Nepali Payment Integration
features.payments.desc: Accept Khalti, eSewa, Fonepay, and cash — all tracked in one dashboard. Automatic VAT calculation included.
features.analytics.title: Business Analytics
features.analytics.desc: See your best-selling items, peak hours, revenue trends, and staff performance. Make data-driven decisions for your restaurant.
features.multilang.title: Bilingual (EN/NE)
features.multilang.desc: Your entire menu and interface works in both English and Nepali. Reach every customer and train every staff member easily.
features.page.title: Platform Features
features.page.subtitle: Built from the ground up for Nepali restaurants. Every feature solves a real problem restaurant owners face daily.
features.detail.qr.title: QR Code Table System
features.detail.qr.bullets.1: Unique QR code for each table
features.detail.qr.bullets.2: Auto-connect to restaurant WiFi on scan
features.detail.qr.bullets.3: Instant digital menu — no app needed
features.detail.menu.title: Digital Menu Management
features.detail.orders.title: Order Flow
features.detail.orders.bullets.1: Customer places order from their phone
features.detail.orders.bullets.2: Kitchen gets it instantly on display
features.detail.orders.bullets.3: Status updates: placed → preparing → ready → served
features.detail.orders.bullets.4: Customer sees real-time progress on their phone
features.detail.payments.title: Payments & Billing
features.detail.analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.detail.desktop.title: Desktop Admin App
features.detail.desktop.bullets.1: Dedicated app for Windows, macOS, Linux
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.
pricing.free.name: Starter
pricing.pro.name: Pro
pricing.faq.title: Questions?
pricing.faq.1.a: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. No lock-in contracts.
pricing.faq.2.q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq.2.a: We accept Khalti, eSewa, Fonepay, and bank transfer for subscriptions.
pricing.faq.3.a: No. Zero setup fees. Create your account and start in under 5 minutes.
download.title: Download the Apps
download.subtitle: Get the customer-facing mobile app and the admin desktop app.
download.customer.title: Customer App
download.customer.desc: For your diners — browse menu, place orders, track status, pay digitally.
download.admin.title: Admin Desktop App
download.admin.desc: For restaurant owners — manage menu, tables, kitchen display, analytics.
register.title: Create Your Restaurant
register.subtitle: Get up and running in under 5 minutes. No credit card required.
register.name: Your Name
register.slugHelp: Your menu will be at mero.restaurant/your-slug
register.success.title: You're Live!
register.success.desc: Your restaurant is set up and ready to go.
about.title: About Mero Restaurant
about.mission: We're building the operating system for Nepali restaurants — so owners can focus on cooking great food, not managing paper.
about.story: Mero Restaurant was born in Surkhet, Nepal, from a simple observation: every restaurant was drowning in manual processes. Paper menus get damaged, orders get lost, bills take forever, and owners have no idea which dishes actually sell. We set out to fix all of this with one affordable, easy-to-use platform.
about.values.title: What We Believe
about.values.1.title: Built for Nepal
about.values.1.desc: Nepali payment methods, bilingual interface, VAT-compliant billing. Not a foreign product adapted — built here, for here.
about.values.2.title: Simple First
about.values.2.desc: If your staff can use a phone, they can use Mero Restaurant. No training manuals needed.
about.values.3.title: Affordable
about.values.3.desc: A free tier that actually works. No predatory pricing. We grow when you grow.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries — we'd love to hear from you.
